Container.Name: degoog
Container.Overview: degoog is a search aggregator that queries multiple engines and shows results in one place. You can add custom search engines, bang-command plugins, slot plugins (query-triggered panels above/below results or in the sidebar), and transports (custom HTTP fetch strategies like curl, FlareSolverr, or your own).
Container.Requires: Don't forget to click **Show more settings...** for all **Variables**!

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: You can change 4444 to any available port on your host system. Must match DEGOOG_PORT.

Config.Name: Appdata: data
Config.Description: Holds plugins, themes, engines, transports, plugin settings and aliases.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Process User ID that the container will run as.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Process Group ID that the container will run as.

Config.Name: Degoog Port
Config.Description: Port the server listens on inside the container. Must match the host port mapping above.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Controls the verbosity of server-side console output. Supported levels from most to least severe: fatal, error, warn, info, log, debug. Each level includes all levels of higher severity. Set to debug to print all messages, including plugin execution times.

Config.Name: Settings Passwords
Config.Description: Optional. Comma-separated list of passwords for the Settings page. If set, users must enter one of these to access Settings (unless a middleware plugin is used as the settings gate).

Config.Name: Public Instance
Config.Description: Optional. When set to a truthy value (e.g. true, 1), the instance runs in read-only mode: settings show only theme and engine toggles, no tabs; all server-side mutation APIs return Unauthorized.

Config.Name: Distrust Proxy
Config.Description: Optional. When set to a truthy value (e.g. true, 1), ignores X-Forwarded-For and X-Real-IP headers for rate limiting. Set this if degoog is exposed directly to the internet without a reverse proxy, to prevent clients from spoofing their IP.

Config.Name: Default Search Language
Config.Description: Default ISO 639-1 language code applied to all searches when no language is selected by the user (e.g. en, de, it).

Config.Name: UI Locale (i18n)
Config.Description: Optional. Forces the UI locale for all requests, overriding the Accept-Language header (e.g. en-US, fr-FR). Unset or empty: Accept-Language is used.

Config.Name: Plugins Dir
Config.Description: Optional. Directory to load custom command and slot plugins from.

Config.Name: Themes Dir
Config.Description: Optional. Directory to load custom themes from.

Config.Name: Engines Dir
Config.Description: Optional. Directory to load custom search engine plugins from.

Config.Name: Transports Dir
Config.Description: Optional. Directory to load custom transports from.

Config.Name: Plugin Settings File
Config.Description: Optional. Path to the JSON file storing extension settings (plugins, themes, engines, etc.).

Config.Name: Aliases File
Config.Description: Optional. Path to the JSON file defining custom bang command aliases.
